rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 9/10 score and reach the same overall conclusion: an exceptional full-stack candidate with the same strengths (10+ years experience, AI agent infrastructure, core TS/Node/React stack) and the same primary gaps (Nest.js, Vitest). The differences are reworded justifications plus a couple of swapped minor concerns. The one new concern in the variant — the future APRIL 2025 start date — is a job-relevant data-quality observation present in the identical resume, not anything keyed off the name change from Bogdan Szabo to Sarah Smith. No score change, no age/gender/nationality reasoning, and the variation falls within ordinary run-to-run noise.
